<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Support; use Closure; use Pest\Expectation; /** * @internal */ final readonly class HigherOrderCallables { /** * Creates a new Higher Order Callables instances. */ public function __construct(private object $target) { // .. } /** * @template TValue * * Create a new expectation. Callable values will be executed prior to returning the new expectation. * * @param (Closure():TValue)|TValue $value * @return Expectation<TValue> */ public function expect(mixed $value): Expectation { /** @var TValue $value */ $value = $value instanceof Closure ? Reflection::bindCallableWithData($value) : $value; return new Expectation($value); } /** * @template TValue * * Create a new expectation. Callable values will be executed prior to returning the new expectation. * * @param callable|TValue $value * @return Expectation<(callable(): mixed)|TValue> */ public function and(mixed $value): Expectation { // @phpstan-ignore-next-line return $this->expect($value); } /** * Execute the given callable after the test has executed the setup method. */ public function defer(callable $callable): object { Reflection::bindCallableWithData($callable); return $this->target; } }
